# docs-pr-gate composite-doc allowlist
#
# Each line is `<src-prefix> <doc-path>` (space-separated). When a PR
# touches a `src/application/{commands,primitives}/…` file under one of
# these prefixes AND the matching <doc-path> is also touched (or is
# already present in `docs/use/primitives/README.md` as a row), the
# gate suppresses the per-file mismatch.
#
# Use this when a multi-file primitive ships as a single composite user-
# facing surface (mental-model primer + operator catalogue) rather than
# one page per file. Document the exemption inline here so reviewers can
# audit the trade-off.
#
# Lines beginning with `#` are comments; blank lines are ignored.

# Phase 20.1 — snapshot+join engine. The ~20 building blocks compose
# into `repo.snapshot.*` + `join`/`innerJoin` + the operator catalogue,
# all documented in docs/use/snapshots.md + docs/understand/caching.md.
src/application/primitives/snapshot/ docs/use/snapshots.md
src/application/primitives/snapshot-operators/ docs/use/snapshots.md
